name: field
visual_summary: A field component is a basic form field that can be used to capture user input. It is typically a rectangular text input with a label. A developer would use it when they need a simple input field in their form.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: field
Description: A field component is a basic form field that can be used to capture user input. It is typically a rectangular text input with a label. A developer would use it when they need a simple input field in their form.
Style: e.g. default, filled, outline
Interactions: 
Tags: form, input, field

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
